flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Trinity Washington University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (77.4% → 69.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Trinity Washington University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Trinity Washington University rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 (20.3% → 26.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Trinity Washington University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (40.6% → 49.3%).
